metadata.review_guidance: Suppliers must publish a public absolute GHG emissions reduction target and report emissions via CDP annually with third-party verification.
metadata.preferred_position: Publish a public absolute greenhouse gas (GHG) emissions reduction target and report emissions data via CDP annually, including Scope 1, 2, and significant Scope 3 categories.

sections.title: Greenhouse Gas Emissions
sections.text: Supply chain hardware suppliers and service and logistics providers are required to report on GHG emissions to CDP on an annual basis. Provide a complete and accurate inventory of corporate-wide Scope 1 and 2 GHG emissions and report on significant categories of Scope 3. Make the response publicly available via CDP. Demonstrate third-party verification of reported GHG emissions. Set a public absolute GHG emissions reduction target and publicly report annual progress against that target.
